perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a bright outdoor shot of a young woman with her hair in a bun, smiling warmly at the camera. (2) Scene shifts to an indoor setting where she smiles radiantly, then transition to her eating Calbee potato chips while looking contemplative. (3) Transitions to a sunny beach; she wears a white dress and a straw bag, running and laughing on the shore. (4) The mood shifts to a dimly lit indoor space where she looks somber; brief cuts show her celebrating a birthday with a cake and a bee plush toy in a vintage film style. (5) Outdoor road scene with Japanese signage under an overcast sky; she is seen looking out of a car window. (6) Back in the sun, she uses a toy to blow bubbles. (7) Transition to a dark, rainy night inside a car; she appears distressed, clutching her head. (8) Wide shot of her standing alone in a desolate field with a bare tree; a large, faded projection of her face appears in the sky above her. (9) Final close-up of her face looking directly at the camera with a serious expression as the title text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy rock music starts immediately featuring a male vocal singing in an expressive, slightly strained tone. (2) The instrumentation includes driving electric guitars and a steady drum kit. (3) The intensity of the music remains consistent through the middle section with the male vocals hitting higher notes. (4) Towards the end, the full rock arrangement cuts out, replaced by a soft, melodic acoustic guitar strumming and gentle 'la la la' humming. (5) No ambient environmental sounds or specific sound effects are audible over the music production.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese lyrics appear at the bottom throughout the video in a yellow font (e.g., '你聽見我了沒有', '我知道已回不去那時候'). (2) Functional Text: At the end, large yellow text displays the song title '你聽見我了沒有' followed by credits '七月 feat. 半四分衛'.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character appearing in various scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, seen in various outfits including a white sweater, a white summer dress, and a black leather jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Varied settings including a sunny park, a cozy living room with a brown leather sofa, a sandy beach with ocean waves, a street with Japanese traffic signs, and a barren field with a leafless tree.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Bright natural sunlight, warm indoor lighting, and dark, moody night lighting with rain effects.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Vibrant and warm for happy scenes; muted, blue, and desaturated for somber scenes.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between song sections; fade out at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Memories -> Emotional Conflict -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a music video designed to evoke a sense of bittersweet nostalgia and emotional longing. By contrasting bright, joyful imagery of the past (beach, smiling, birthday) with dark, rainy, and desolate imagery of the present, it illustrates the pain of a lost connection or an unrequited desire to be heard, as emphasized by the lyrics and the dramatic visual metaphors like the face in the sky.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A bag of Calbee potato chips is prominently displayed and consumed by the main character in an early scene.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Japanese street aesthetic combined with Chinese lyrics; use of double exposure/superimposed imagery in the climax.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows typical East Asian indie-pop music video tropes, utilizing high-contrast lighting and location shifts to signal emotional transitions.
